curatorNote:
Skulls of Luci is Sam Spratt's set of unique skull paintings - one for every collector who placed an offer on the genesis Chapter 1 auctions and each derived from The Blueprint Skull. Rendered as porous husks and vessels of ancestry, they carry the saga's theme of death and renewal in its rawest, most elemental form.

Hivemind holds two Skulls and their Council Mask counterparts, and with them two seats on the Council of Luci.
